item.title: Eccentric Credence
item.dc:creator: Art Supreme
item.description: This ai art is signed by Art Supreme. It is made on canvas and it comes with the original Certificate of Authenticity.
item.content:encoded: This work is a unique, representational wrap of possibilities that reflect viewers’ own attention mechanism. It is a contrasting consequence that AI approximation of the real world representation can often bring with a dose of multi-channel bias which may or may not be the reminiscent of an unpredictable and turbulent world.

item.title: Summer Dream
item.dc:creator: Art Supreme
item.description: This ai art is signed by Art Supreme. It is made on canvas and it comes with the original Certificate of Authenticity.
item.content:encoded:
This work is an expressionist, decorative elevated platform consisting of lake and sky which is unreminiscent of high-tech gloss and interactivity.

The work suggests contemporary life, culture, and science as a continually deferred relationship.

item.title: Head Asylum
item.dc:creator: Art Supreme
item.description: This ai art is signed by Art Supreme. It is made on canvas and it comes with the original Certificate of Authenticity.
item.content:encoded: Head Asylum is on the one hand touchingly beautiful, on the other hand painfully attractive. Again and again, the work leaves us orphaned with a mix of conflicting feelings and thoughts.

item.title: Shipfluent
item.dc:creator: Art Supreme
item.description: This ai art is signed by Art Supreme. It is made on canvas and it comes with the original Certificate of Authenticity.
item.content:encoded: Shipfluent doesn’t reference recognisable form. The results are deconstructed to the extent that meaning is shifted and possible interpretation becomes multifaceted.

item.title: Horsegenics
item.dc:creator: Art Supreme
item.description: This ai art is signed by Art Supreme. It is made on canvas and it comes with the original Certificate of Authenticity.
item.content:encoded: Horsegenics shows inherent visual seductiveness, along with the conciseness of the exhibitions, further complicates the reception of its multiple manifold layers of meaning.

item.title: Crusaide
item.dc:creator: Art Supreme
item.description: This ai art is signed by Art Supreme. It is made on canvas and it comes with the original Certificate of Authenticity.
item.content:encoded:
Crusaide plays with the idea of the mortality of an artwork confronted with the power of a transitory appearance, which is, by being restricted in time, much more intense.

This painting sometimes radiate a cold and latent violence. At times, disconcerting beauty emerges.

item.title: Brain Affairs
item.dc:creator: Art Supreme
item.description: This ai art is signed by Art Supreme. It is made on canvas and it comes with the original Certificate of Authenticity.
item.content:encoded: Brain Affairs demonstrates how life extends beyond its own subjective limits and often tells a story about the effects of global cultural interaction. It challenges the binaries we continually reconstruct between Self and Other, between our own ‘cannibal’ and ‘civilized’ selves.

item.title: Artes Face
item.dc:creator: Art Supreme
item.description: This ai art is signed by Art Supreme. It is made on canvas and it comes with the original Certificate of Authenticity.
item.content:encoded: By replaying the work for each exhibition and pushing the evocative power of the work a little further, Artes Face focuses on the idea of ‘public space’ and more specifically on spaces where anyone can do anything at any given moment: the non-private space, the non-privately owned space, space that is economically interesting.
